creator: info@babaei.net
text:
I upgraded my server to 11.1-RELEASE and did a force rebuild of all packages using: portupgrade -afkC

I noticed my mailserver stopped working by throwing these errors inside maillog:

Aug  4 15:00:59 3rr0r dovecot: imap(email@example.com): Error: Plugin 'antispam' not found from directory /usr/local/lib/dovecot
Aug  4 15:00:59 3rr0r dovecot: imap(email@example.com): Error: Internal error occurred. Refer to server log for more information.

I tried to reinstall mail/dovecot2-antispam-plugin from ports and to my surprise it was gone from ports. I consulted /usr/ports/UPDATING and unfortunately it did not mention anything about it.

Is is going to be removed from ports permanently? If so, what is the reason?
